meaning: adj.源于生物的,生物所造成的
examples: Development and use of biogenic pesticides emerges as The Times require.
Different environmental factor shows different importance for different kind of biogenic sulfur gas.
The polymers change color in the presence of increasing levels of these biogenic amines to indicate degrees of food spoilage.
For biofuels, this means counting their direct emissions to the atmosphere without automatic crediting of biogenic carbon.
It will look for gases of biogenic origin.
